topic: feedback for students regarding new college canteen.
title: New College Canteen Feedback
description: Share your thoughts on the new college canteen to help us enhance your dining experience.

questions.label: How would you rate your overall experience with the new college canteen?
Which of the following aspects of the canteen's food offerings are you most satisfied or dissatisfied with?
How would you rate the fairness of the pricing for items in the new canteen?
Do you find the canteen environment (cleanliness, seating, ambiance) comfortable and welcoming?
Please share any additional suggestions or comments you have for improving the new college canteen experience.
Which food you like the most?
